alkylation reagent: reacted with 55 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 20 min in the dark.
alkylation concentration: reacted with 55 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 20 min in the dark.
enrichment method: Ycf1p was then purified with anti-FLAG affinity chromatography.
fractionation method: isolated from their dimeric counterparts by gel filtration chromatography.
labeling: ATPase activity of Ycf1p was measured using the Malachite Green assay.
reduction reagent: incubation with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) at 60 °C for 1 h.
reduction concentration: incubation with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) at 60 °C for 1 h.
